access_token.description: WorkflowMax API v2 OAuth2 access token, sent as a Bearer token on every request. Never logged.

account_id.description: WorkflowMax/Xero organisation identifier, sent as the required account-id header on every v2 request (api-docs.workflowmax.com Authentication).

base_url.description: WorkflowMax API base URL. Defaults to the production v2 endpoint; override for test proxies.

updated_since.description: Optional YYYY-MM-DD lower bound for the jobs/clients updatedSince filter. When unset, every read is a full stream read (matching legacy's own always-full-read behavior).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
